title: Liamo Co.'s More Ranged Items
description: Adds 4 medieval firearms to the game.
body:
This mod adds 4 medieval firearms to the game.

 

Arquebus:

A medieval rifle. Holds 6 shots per shell.

 

Blunderbuss:

Reload with up to 8 shots. Depending on the amount of shots you put in is how many projectiles are shot.

 

Duck's Foot Pistol:

Like the blunderbuss but only holds up to 4 shots and does twice as much damage

 

Hand Mortar:

Reload with a bomb. When projectile hits ground it explodes.

 

Flintlock Chambers:

All weapons require them in crafting and better ones increase the amount of damage a weapon will deal.

 

(btw, press R to reload weapons)

 

If you'd like me to add anything else, please tell me.
